title: PsychoLife
content:
PsychoLife

About

Numbers

PsychoHayat is a current publication of Uskudar University, open to everyone, without any publication fee. All publication costs are sponsored by Üsküdar University Publications and Human Values and Mental Health Foundation. In each issue of PsychoLife, different researches, comments, columns, special interviews and articles under a special topic, as well as news about Üsküdar University are presented to the readers.
